name: prism
description: Work with OpenAI Prism projects, files, and local folder sync from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Prism projects, files, and sync
interface.longDescription: Use Prism from Codex to find projects, inspect and download project files, upload changes, and keep a local folder synchronized with a Prism project while preserving safe conflict handling.
defaultPrompt: Pull this Prism project into a local folder
Sync my local LaTeX folder with the Prism project
